226961.name: Homevision - Galerius Arch Condo - City Center
226961.description:
Discover the perfect Thessaloniki getaway! This fully renovated apartment combines modern style, top-notch comfort, and a prime location in the heart of the city. With breathtaking views of the iconic Kamara (Arch of Galerius) from the balcony, you'll feel immersed in the city's vibrant atmosphere from the moment you arrive.

What Makes This Space Unique:
Wake up to spectacular views of Thessaloniki’s historic Kamara and experience the city’s lively energy from your private balcony. The open-concept design, stylish furnishings, and natural light throughout create a welcoming space for both relaxation and entertainment. Whether you're visiting for business or leisure, this home offers everything you need for a memorable stay.

Amenities You’ll Love:
- Living Room: Sink into the cozy sofa, enjoy a movie on the Smart TV, or work remotely at the dedicated office desk with ergonomic seating.
- Fully Equipped Kitchen: Cook like a pro with modern appliances, ample counter space, and all essential cookware and utensils.
- Bedrooms: Enjoy restful nights in two comfortable bedrooms, featuring plush bedding, warm lighting, and generous storage options.
- Bathroom: Refresh in the elegant walk-in shower, equipped with high-quality fixtures and complimentary toiletries.
- Balcony: Soak in panoramic views of the Kamara and surrounding landmarks

A True Local Experience:
Located on a bustling road, this apartment offers unbeatable access to Thessaloniki’s rich history and vibrant city life. Within a short walking distance, you’ll find:

Kamara (Arch of Galerius) just steps away
The iconic White Tower
The lively Aristotelous Square
Thessaloniki's bustling waterfront promenade
While the central location means you’ll be close to all the action, please note that some noise is to be expected due to the apartment’s position on a busy street.

Ready to immerse yourself in Thessaloniki’s culture and history? Book now and enjoy stunning views, unmatched convenience, and the comforts of this stylish urban retreat.

226995.name: Homevision - City Chic: Cozy Balcony Bliss
226995.description:
Welcome to City Chic: Cozy Balcony Bliss. 
The perfect urban getaway, a small piece of heaven. 

A home that feels like home takes time to refine. The apartment was built and rebuilt over the years with a great attention to detail, while maintaining it's character and portraying my personality. 

The apartment is located in a live and colourful neighbourhood, right in the heart of the city

Enjoy a stylish getaway at this centrally-located apartment and elevate your experience in Thessaloniki!

227004.name: Homevision - Stylish & Serene Condo - City Center
227004.description:
Step into a stylish retreat that seamlessly blends modern minimalism with a warm and inviting ambiance. 

Located in the heart of Thessaloniki, this thoughtfully designed apartment is your ideal base for exploring the city's vibrant culture and history while enjoying the comforts of a tranquil sanctuary.

What Makes This Space Unique:

- Bright & Airy Design: Large windows fill the space with natural light, highlighting the neutral tones, sleek wooden floors, and subtle artistic accents throughout the apartment.
- Quirky yet Functional Layout: The apartment offers a unique charm with its open-concept design, featuring a cozy workspace that flows effortlessly into the bedroom—a perfect setup for remote workers or travelers seeking inspiration.
- Chic Balcony Oasis: Step outside to your private balcony and enjoy a morning coffee or an evening glass of wine amidst the urban skyline. With comfortable seating and artistic touches, it’s a serene spot to unwind.
- Spa-Inspired Bathroom: Luxuriate in a modern bathroom featuring sleek fixtures, wood accents, and a rainfall shower—your own private spa experience.
Artful Touches Everywhere: From contemporary paintings to a collection of art books, every detail has been curated to create a sophisticated and inviting atmosphere.

Amenities You'll Love:

- Ultra-fast 200 Mbps internet (Up/Down)
- Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher, microwave, kettle, and Nespresso machine (regular, decaf, and tea provided)
- Convenient washer, dryer, and ironing setup (iron and ironing board included)
- 55-inch Smart TV with an active Netflix subscription
- Bose Bluetooth speaker for immersive sound
- Plush, queen-sized bed with hotel-quality linens
- Spa-like bathroom essentials, including a hair dryer, fluffy towels, and premium toiletries

A True Local Experience:

Nestled on the 6th floor and overlooking a serene backstreet, this condo combines tranquility with proximity to Thessaloniki’s vibrant pulse—just steps away from bustling cafes, shops, and iconic landmarks like the White Tower.

Whether you're visiting for leisure, work, or a bit of both, this apartment is designed to make your stay unforgettable. Book now and discover why guests keep coming back!

227094.name: Homevision - Comfort In The Heart Of The City
227094.description:
Escape to a spacious world of classical elegance in the heart of the city! Welcome to our Airbnb!
A harmonious blend of timeless charm, modern amenities, and meticulous decoration. It's a perfect starting point to explore the city. Amenities include WiFi, Heating, A/C, Washing Machine, Kitchen, Smart TV. It's perfect for longer stays.  
Within walking distance:
5 minutes to the beachfront
5 minutes to the Aristotelous Square
7 minutes to the White Tower

This space is our family condo. 

Included with your stay:

- Fast WiFi 
- Coffee, Decaf, Tea
- Washing Mashine
- Microwave
- Full Kitchen
- Kettle
- Smart TV 
- Αctive Netflix subscription
- Iron 
- Hairdryer

The whole apartment will be yours and we hope you will feel right at home as soon as you walk in. Access is restricted only to some cupboards where we keep our personal items.

During your stay, I will be available for anything you may need. Communication is preferable through Airbnb, except for urgent situations when you can reach me on my mobile.

The neighbourhood is vibrant, quirky and artsy. You can encounter people from all walks of life. From classy older couples, punks, street musicians and actors, to students and writers.  

There are many shops within a short walking distance like Supermarkets, Pharmacies, Bakeries, Coffee Shops, Bars, Restaurants and lots of small Indie Shops. There's even some 24h shops around where you can buy some basic stuff.

257825.name: Homevision Okto Penthouse View - Super Central
257825.description:
Welcome to our super bright Okto Penthouse! A warm space where contemporary comfort meets city living – you've just found your perfect Thessaloniki hideaway! Enjoy the gorgeous view of Ano Poli, and the Thessaloniki skyline as you kick back and relax. Just steps away from markets, restaurants, bars and many of Thessaloniki's landmarks, this exquisite penthouse has been newly renovated, offers all the amenities you need and makes the perfect oasis for a great short (or longer) stay!

Step out of the elevator and enter, a jump away is the open-plan living area, where minimalist chic plays nice with rustic charm.

Curl up on the plush grey sofa with a cuppa, or swing your worries away on the indoor hammock chair. Oh, and that view from the window? It's not just any view – it’s your new favourite coffee companion.

The kitchen? It’s what your foodie dreams are made of, with a touch of vintage vibes and all the necessary to whip up a Greek feast. And let’s talk about the dining table – a true centrepiece where stories and cocktails are destined to be shared.

When it's time to turn in, our bedroom are plush and comfy. Got work to do? We've got a small spot that'll make even work feel a bit more like play.

Step outside to the small balcony, and you're up close and personal with Thessaloniki's heartbeat. Take a deep breath – that's the smell of urban adventure calling.

This penthouse is more than just a place to stay, it's a carefully curated experience, designed to leave guests with a lasting impression of elegance and ease. Whether it's for a short getaway or an extended stay, this is a space where memories are made and savoured.

Enjoy exclusive access to the last floor of the building.

We 're always available for any questions or to attend any problems that might occur. For everyone's security, we prefer communicating through Airbnb, but of course our phone is available anytime of the day for emergencies.

The penthouse is located at the borders of the Valaoritou area. This neighborhood has evolved remarkably over the years, transitioning from an industrial hub to a vibrant district. This transformation has seen the repurposing of old warehouses and commercial buildings into bars, clubs, and cafes, attracting a diverse crowd looking for entertainment and socialisation. The area is known for its eclectic mix of venues, ranging from mainstream clubs to more alternative spaces, catering to a wide array of musical tastes and preferences.

During the day, Valaoritou offers a more subdued experience, with several cafes and eateries serving as meeting points for casual business encounters or leisurely hours spent with friends. The architecture in the area reflects its industrial past, with many buildings maintaining their original facades, adding to the unique character of the neighbourhood.

Valaoritou's central location in Thessaloniki, close to major landmarks and the city’s waterfront, makes it a convenient destination for both locals and tourists. Its transformation is emblematic of Thessaloniki's broader urban regeneration efforts, blending historical preservation with modern urban culture. The area's success in attracting a vibrant night-time economy has contributed to its reputation as a key nightlife destination within the city, embodying the energetic spirit of Thessaloniki.

We wouldn't advise getting around by car in any large urban center. It's difficult to find a parking spot. There are some private parking facilities, but you'd have to book your parking spot in advance if you want to be on the safe side.  
For getting around in the city, there are a couple of options:

- By bus. There's an app where you can check all the bus routes, schedule, plan etc.
- Rental E-bikes/ E- scooters. 
- By taxi, using an application on your smartphone.

After your reservation, all relevant information will be provided to you.

- Since the penthouse is in a very vibrant neighborhood, some noise is to be expected, especially during the weekends.

- You are choosing to book our home using a 3rd party website and not booking direct. Airbnb does not share your info with us. When you book, you are agreeing to submit a copy of your photo ID and your email address to us after you book. This is standard procedure for professional property managers and required by local law.

HOUSE RULES

- No parties or events: Parties, gatherings, and functions of any kind are strictly prohibited on the Airbnb property.
- Pets: No pets allowed. 
- Smoking: Smoking is prohibited inside the home.
- Checkout: Checkout is at 11 a.m. Late checkout can be accommodated upon request and subject to availability. 
- Lost key fees: In case the penthouse keys are lost, there's a fee of 75 EUR to be paid.
- Maintenance: Please inform the host in the event that anything breaks or isn’t functioning properly, and we will do our best to address it during your stay.
- Rearranging furniture: Please do not rearrange any of the furniture within the property.
- Trash: Please take your trash bags when leaving and dispose them in the bin.

263225.name: Homevision - Bright & Spacious next to City Center
263225.description:
Ένα καλαίσθητο διαμέρισμα  μόλις 10 λεπτά με τα πόδια από το κέντρο της Θεσσαλονίκης. Το διαμέρισμα βρίσκεται στον πρώτο όροφο  εξολοκλήρου   αναπαλαιωμένης μονοκατοικίας.

Ο χώρος αποτελείται από 1 υπνοδωμάτιο με διπλό κρεβάτι ,1 μικρότερο δωματιο με καναπέ κρεβάτι που μπορεί να φιλοξενήσει έως και 2 παιδιά  και τέλος  το σαλόνι με καναπέ κρεβάτι που μπορεί να κοιμήσει 2 ενήλικες .

Διαθέσιμος μέσω τηλεφώνου κ email

Ήσυχη γειτονιά σε απόσταση 10 λεπτών με τα από το κέντρο της πόλης.

316453.name: Homevision - Downtown Lambda
316453.description: Welcome to your perfect urban retreat! This charming studio is just steps from the waterfront and port, offering easy access to the city’s best attractions. Enjoy a super comfortable bed, a well-equipped kitchen, and modern amenities. Explore nearby cafes, restaurants, and the famous White Tower—all within walking distance. Perfect for solo travelers or couples looking for a relaxing getaway in the vibrant city center. Book now for a memorable stay!

328211.name: Homevision - Urban Hub
328211.description:
Καλωσορίσατε στο Urban Hub στο κέντρο της Θεσσαλονίκης!
Ανακαλύψτε τη μαγεία της πόλης μέσα από το ζεστό και φιλόξενο διαμέρισμά μας.  Στην καρδιά του κέντρου, μόλις 2 λεπτά με τα πόδια από τη ΔΕΘ και 5 λεπτά από το Λευκό Πύργο και την παραλία. Αν και βρίσκεται στην καρδιά της πόλης, βρίσκεται σε πολύ ήσυχη τοποθεσία.  
Ιδανικό για φίλους, ζευγάρια, μικρές οικογένειες ή επαγγελματίες, αυτό το διαμέρισμα αποτελεί την ιδανική βάση για να εξερευνήσει κανείς τη Θεσσαλονίκη!

349175.name: Homevision - Nido Blu
349175.description:
Experience elegance and comfort in our centrally located apartment, just steps from the Galerius Arch and the famous Aristotelous Square. Perfect for up to 4 guests, the space features modern design, a cozy bedroom, and a sofa bed. Enjoy fast Wi-Fi, two A/C units, a Smart TV, a fully equipped kitchen, and a washing machine. With its prime location and chic interior, this is the ultimate base to explore Thessaloniki.

Book your stay now and make your trip unforgettable!

370291.name: Green Oasis W/Free Parking 5 min
370291.description:
Forget your worries in this spacious and serene space.

The apartment is also ideal for remote workers, as it offers a desk with an office chair, which, combined with the high-speed Internet connection of 100Mbps, can accommodate your home-office needs.

Beautifully furnished fully equipped apartment with FREE PARKING in the building, AC, balcony and at the  Kato Touba area, with many fast foods, coffee shops, super markets and 24h/7 mini markets in a walking distance of 3-5 min..
Public transport day(near bus stop of bus nr12) and night. 

The space

THE APARTMENT SIZE : 47 m2+ 11 m2 balcony
 Bedroom:
- 12 m2 
- 150x200 cm bed
- wardrobe
- door to the balcony
- sound- and thermo insulated double glass)



Living room/ 2nd Bedroom
- 20 m2 / 
- 1 sofa transformable to double bed
- flat-screen smart TV 43'' with Neflix app(just add your credentials)
- 1 armchair
- 1 more sofa
- Desk with office chair
- Low traffic street, no bus traffic, windows are new sound- and thermo insulated double glass)
- AC
-The apartment is also ideal for remote workers, as it offers a desk with an office chair, which, combined with the high-speed Internet connection of 100Mbps, can accommodate your home-office needs.

Kitchen/diner:
- has all the basics for simple cooking
- stove and oven
- fridge and freezer
- microwave etc.
-Nespresso machine 
- dining table with 4 chairs

Bathroom
- shower with curtain
- washbasin with cabinets & mirror
- washing machine
-Hair dryer

Balcony
- amazing green view 
-table with 2 comfy chairs

Garage
- free parking space at the building for our guests 

The apartment is located on the 2nd floor, there is an elevator.

Guest access
The entire apartment is exclusively yours during your stay, no shared spaces with other guests within the apartment. The parking spot is in the ground floor, covered, but open with camera surveillance

The area
-2 min walking(400m) to the metro station "Papafi"
-5 min walking to the Touba Stadium
- 10 min walking to University Macedonia and Aristotle University of Thessaloniki
-2 min walking to the bus station of BUS NR 12.( that takes you straight to the center)
-7 min walking to the Ippokrateio Hospital and about 10 min walking to the Theageneio Hospital

The entire apartment is exclusively yours during your stay, no shared spaces with other guests within the apartment. The parking spot is in the ground floor, covered, but open with camera surveillance

383939.name: Heart Of Ladadika | A/C  Smart TV| Self Check-In
383939.description: The whole group will enjoy easy access to everything from this centrally located place.

385055.name: 100Mbps|Smart TV|A/C|Self Check-In|Full Kitchen
385055.description: Χαλαρώστε σε αυτόν τον ήρεμο, κομψό χώρο.

435161.name: Homevision - Thessaloniki 360
435161.description: Wake up to sweeping panoramic views of Thessaloniki in this stylish top-floor apartment. Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony offer a 360° city-to-sea vista, perfect for sunrise coffee or sunset drinks. Designed for comfort and elegance, it’s your ideal base to explore the city’s heart while enjoying unmatched scenery.

454982.name: AnT-one | Designer Neo-Classical Apartment
454982.description:
Πλημμυρισμένο από φως, με απρόσκοπτη θέα στα διατηρητέα κτήρια της περιοχής. Γωνιακό στη συμβολή της Εγνατίας Οδού και της Αντιγονιδών, το AnT-one ισορροπεί με αυτοπεποίθηση ανάμεσα στη διαχρονική κομψότητα και το σύγχρονο μινιμαλιστικό ύφος. Οι διακριτικές ρομαντικές πινελιές δημιουργούν μια ατμόσφαιρα ζεστασιάς και φινέτσας ενώ κάθε δωμάτιο συνθέτει το δικό του αυτόνομο περιβάλλον άνεσης και αισθητικής.

Ένα Αρχιτεκτονικό Διαμάντι στο Κέντρο της Θεσσαλονίκης όπου η Νεοκλασική φόρμα συναντά τη Σύγχρονη Πολυτέλεια. Με την κινηματογραφική αίσθηση της Ευρωπαϊκής μεγαλούπολης και τη διατήρηση της αρχιτεκτονικής προοπτικής, το ψηλοτάβανο νεοκλασικό διαμέρισμα των 110 τ.μ., έχει σχεδιαστεί για να προσφέρει μια αξέχαστη εμπειρία αστικής φιλοξενίας. Στον 2ο όροφο ενός επιβλητικού ιστορικού κτιρίου, αποτελεί αναπόσπαστο μέρος της δυναμικής ροής της πόλης, σε μία από τις πιο κομβικές και ζωντανές περιοχές της Θεσσαλονίκης.

Οι Χώροι που θα Αγαπήσετε:
• Τρία μεγάλα υπνοδωμάτια με ατμοσφαιρική διακόσμηση και γραφείο εργασίας.
• Δύο όμορφα, λειτουργικά μπάνια
• Πλήρως εξοπλισμένη κουζίνα για γεύματα στο σπίτι
• Χώρος καθιστικού–τραπεζαρίας ιδανικός για στιγμές χαλάρωσης ή κοινωνικότητας
• Πέντε μπαλκόνια που πλημμυρίζουν το διαμέρισμα με φυσικό φως
• 60" Smart TV για απόλυτη ψυχαγωγία
• Πλυντήριο ρούχων για μεγαλύτερη άνεση

Όλα μας τα καταλύματα είναι μη καπνιζόντων, απαγορεύονται τα πάρτυ και τα κατοικίδια. 
Επισημαίνεται πως για λόγους προστασίας του χώρου και ασφάλειας των φιλοξενούμενών μας, εποπτεύεται σε 24η βάση ο αριθμός των ατόμων που προσέρχονται σε αυτό.

455593.name: 100 Mbps|Smart TV|A/C|Self Check In|Full Kitchen
455593.description:
Step into a bright, design-forward apartment in the heart of Thessaloniki. This modern space blends clean lines, curated décor, and a calm atmosphere — ideal for relaxing after a day in the city or working comfortably from home.

Every corner has been arranged with intention:
• A spacious living area with curated art and a smart TV for cozy evenings
• A sleek, fully equipped kitchen with marble backsplash and warm wood finishes
• A dedicated workspace with shelving, ergonomic chair, and soft lighting
• A bedroom featuring fresh linens and a comfortable mattress
• A beautifully renovated bathroom with a walk-in shower

Large windows flood the rooms with natural light throughout the day, while neutral tones and modern styling make the apartment feel clean, fresh, and inviting.

Amenities You’ll Love

• Fast Wi-Fi — ideal for work & streaming
• Smart TV
• Fully equipped kitchen
• Coffee machine
• Workspace with ergonomic chair
• Air conditioning
• Fresh towels & linens
• Walk-in shower
• Balcony with street views
• Self check-in

Everything is set up for a comfortable, effortless stay.

A True Local Experience

You’ll be staying just a short walk from the city’s most lively spots — cafes, markets, small bakeries, and the waterfront — while the street itself remains quiet and relaxed. This balance makes the apartment perfect whether you’re visiting for work, leisure, or an extended stay.

If you’re looking for a stylish, comfortable, and well-located base in Thessaloniki, you’ll feel right at home here. Book your stay and enjoy a space designed with care, comfort, and great guest experience in mind.

Guests have full access to the entire apartment. You’ll have the living room, kitchen, bedroom, and bathroom entirely to yourself, along with the balcony. Everything shown in the photos is for your private use. Entry is simple and secure through a lockbox.

We 're always available for anything you need before or during your stay. Message me anytime on the Airbnb app, and I’ll respond quickly. If you prefer a more hands-off stay, everything is set up so you can check in, settle in, and enjoy the space without interruptions.

The apartment is located on the 1st floor and is accessible only by stairs, as the building does not have an elevator.

Because the home sits in the heart of Thessaloniki’s city center, you may hear some street noise during your stay — normal for the area’s lively atmosphere.

462558.name: A/C•Smart TV•Balcony•Curated Design•Full Kitchen
462558.description:
Stay in a light-filled, gallery-style apartment steps from Agia Sofia in the heart of Thessaloniki. High ceilings, balcony doors and warm wooden floors frame a comfy king bedroom, large living & dining room, full kitchen and dedicated work desk. Browse the art, books and music, then walk to the seafront, cafés and bars in minutes – the perfect base for couples, friends or remote workers.

This apartment is a spacious, character-filled home created by art gallerists who love design, books and music. It sits in a classic building right next to Agia Sofia, so you are in the centre of Thessaloniki with everything on your doorstep.

The open-plan living and dining area has very high ceilings with original details, large windows and balcony doors that flood the space with natural light. A deep teal sofa, vintage armchairs and a striking glass coffee table make the lounge a relaxing place to unwind with a drink, read or watch the smart TV.

The dining area features a large wooden table with mixed chairs, ideal for shared meals or setting up a laptop. Around the room you’ll find shelves of books, magazines, CDs and carefully chosen artworks and objects – guests are welcome to enjoy the library and the music collection during their stay.

The kitchen is fully equipped with hob, oven, fridge, cookware, basic spices and coffee-making facilities, so you can easily prepare breakfast or a full meal at home.

In the bedroom you’ll find a comfortable king-size bed with quality linens and blackout curtains for a good night’s sleep. There is also a small office / reading nook with a desk, chair and lamp, perfect for remote work or quiet study.

The apartment includes air conditioning, heating and a washer for longer stays.

Guests have exclusive use of the entire apartment during their stay, including the living and dining area, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, balcony access and the reading/working nook.

We give guests privacy but are available if you need anything before or during your stay. You can contact us through the Airbnb app for quick help with recommendations, questions about the apartment or any issues that may come up.

The apartment is on the 2nd floor and there is no elevator, so please be comfortable with stairs.

Because the location is very central, guests should expect some city noise; it is not completely quiet.

For your safety and to protect the property, there is a security camera only at the apartment entrance, recording video of the doorway area. This camera is used to monitor arrivals and departures and to help ensure that only registered guests enter the apartment.

Unregistered visitors, parties or events are not allowed. By booking you confirm that you agree to respect the maximum number of guests on the reservation and this house rule.

After booking is confirmed,  a photo of the ID or passport of the main guest is required in order to proceed with the reservation and register your stay.

465070.name: Art Galore!
465070.description:
Stay in our bright neoclassical apartment with very high ceilings, bold artwork and design details, right in the heart of Thessaloniki. With two bedrooms, 1.5 bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen and a balcony overlooking the street, it’s a stylish base for families, friends and small groups.

This neoclassical apartment combines historic character with fresh, modern design. Very high ceilings, tall windows and warm-toned tiled floors make the space feel open and airy, while statement art pieces and custom furniture give it a unique personality. It’s the kind of home that looks great in photos but feels even better to live in.

What makes this space unique

Every corner has been arranged with intention:

Light-filled living area with curated art, a smart TV and a sculptural coffee table, designed for relaxing after a day in the city.

Design-focused seating including the turquoise bench with cat-print upholstery, graphic wall art and playful decor that gives the apartment a gallery-like feel without being cold.

Fully equipped kitchen with marble backsplash, sleek cabinetry and all the essentials to prepare breakfast or simple meals at home.

Two distinct bedrooms

The main bedroom has a comfortable double bed with quality linens, soft lighting and blackout curtains for a good night’s sleep.

The second bedroom is a fun, dorm-style room with two bunk beds (4 single beds) in clean white metal frames, set against a large black-and-white jungle mural – perfect for kids, friends or a group who want their own beds.

2 half bathrooms

One bathroom with walk-in shower and sink

A second, smaller bathroom with toilet and sink, convenient for mornings when everyone is getting ready.

Large windows bring in natural light throughout the day, and the neutral base palette makes the bold art and furniture stand out while still feeling calm and welcoming.

Amenities you’ll love
- Fast Wi-Fi – easy for streaming and planning your days
- Smart TV
- Air conditioning
- Central heating
- Fully equipped kitchen (hob, oven, fridge, cookware, basic utensils)
- Coffee machine
- Fresh towels & linens
- Walk-in shower with constant hot water
- Balcony with street views
- Self check-in via lockbox

Everything is set up for a comfortable, low-stress stay.

A true local experience

You’ll be staying in the centre of Thessaloniki, within walking distance of cafés, bakeries, small restaurants, shops and the waterfront. You can step out in the morning for coffee and bougatsa, explore the city on foot, then come back to a quiet, stylish home to rest. It’s an ideal location whether you’re here for a weekend escape, a city break with friends or a longer stay.

If you’re looking for a spacious, design-led apartment with character, comfort and a central location, this home is a great match. Book your stay and enjoy Thessaloniki from a neoclassical space that’s been put together with care and an eye for detail.

Guests have exclusive use of the entire apartment:

2 bedrooms (1 double bedroom + 1 bedroom with two bunk beds / 4 single beds)

1 full bathroom with shower, sink and toilet

1 additional bathroom with toilet and sink

Living area

Kitchen

Balcony

Check-in is self-service via lockbox, so you can arrive at the time that suits you within the check-in window. The apartment is on the 1st floor of the building and is accessed by stairs only (no elevator).

We give guests space to enjoy the apartment in privacy but we' re always available if you need anything. You can reach us easily through the Airbnb app or by phone for recommendations, questions or help during your stay. If you’d like tips on local food, coffee, bars or things to do, we' re happy to share our favourites.

- The apartment is on the 1st floor without an elevator, so you’ll need to use the stairs.

- Because the home is in the heart of the centre, you may hear some normal city noise during your stay (voices, traffic, nearby cafés).

- The second bedroom has bunk beds, which many families and groups love; just keep this in mind when choosing who sleeps where.

- Please respect the building’s quiet hours and common areas so that everyone in the building can enjoy a pleasant stay.

467874.name: Homevision - 1 Gbit | AC |Central | Quiet | Bright
467874.description:
Keep it simple at this peaceful and centrally-located place.

The apartment features a welcoming living area designed for relaxing after a day in the city. A comfortable sofa, flat-screen TV, and sound system create an easy place to unwind, while large windows keep the space bright and airy. The sofa can also be used as an additional sleeping option when needed.

The kitchen is fully equipped and designed for real use, not just basics. You’ll find a full set of appliances, cookware, and storage, making it easy to prepare anything from a quick breakfast to full meals. This setup works especially well for guests staying longer.

There are two separate bedrooms:

Bedroom 1 features a comfortable double bed with quality linens, soft lighting, and a calm atmosphere for restful sleep.

Bedroom 2 offers a single bed, ideal for a third guest, a child, or someone who prefers their own private sleeping space.

The apartment includes one bathroom with a shower, sink, toilet, and a washing machine — a practical addition for extended stays.

Amenities You’ll Love

The Neighborhood

You’ll be staying in one of Thessaloniki’s coolest central areas, surrounded by cafes, bakeries, restaurants, shops, and local life. Everything is within walking distance, while the apartment itself stays peaceful and quiet — a rare balance in the city center.

Whether you’re visiting for work, leisure, or an extended stay, the location makes it easy to experience Thessaloniki like a local.

Guests have exclusive access to the entire apartment. There are no shared spaces. You’ll be able to come and go freely and enjoy the home with full privacy throughout your stay.

We respect our guests’ privacy, but we are always available if needed. Support is available by message or phone for questions, recommendations, or assistance during your stay.
